LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Codex_Supremacy.description: The Bruderschaft des Stahls operates under the strict tenets of the Codex, a sacred doctrine that demands the preservation and control of advanced technology. Under Elder Maxson, the Brotherhood has united the ideals of both the Outcasts' technological zealotry and Lyons' willingness to engage with outsiders - but on the Brotherhood's terms. Technology must be controlled, mutants and synths are abominations to be destroyed, and only through discipline and hierarchy can humanity be saved from itself. The Brotherhood is both shield and sword - protecting humanity while ensuring gefährlich technology never falls into the wrong hands.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Codex_Supremacy.label: Kodex-Überlegenheit
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Paladins.description: Paladins are the Brotherhood's elite warriors, clad in power armor and wielding the most advanced weapons. They are the tip of the spear in any Brotherhood operation, trained to engage the most gefährlich threats head-on. A Paladin's duty is to lead from the front, inspire their squadmates, and demonstrate the Brotherhood's martial superiority.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Paladins.label: Paladine aus Stahl
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lost_Hills_Codex_Eternal.descri: Lost Hills represents the original Bruderschaft des Stahls - the purest interpretation of the Codex as written by Roger Maxson himself. Technology must be preserved at any cost, outsiders are never to be trusted, and the Brotherhood's bloodlines must remain pure. Isolation is strength. The wasteland may burn, but the Brotherhood will endure, guarding humanity's technological legacy until the world is ready to rebuild - on Brotherhood terms.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lost_Hills_Codex_Eternal.label: Der Codex Eternal
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Shield.description: The Shield of the People represents everything the Lyons Pride stands for - warriors who protect the innocent and fight for those who cannot fight for themselves. They combine Brotherhood combat prowess with genuine compassion, serving as both saltiers and humanitarian workers.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Shield.label: Schilde des Volkes
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Steel_Compassion.descript: Elder Lyons lehrte, dass Technologie wertlos ist, wenn sie den Menschen nicht dient. Die Lyons Pride glaubt, dass die Bruderschaft mehr sein muss als Sammler und Horter – sie muss Beschützer und Baumeister sein. Obwohl sie immer noch an die technische Weisheit des Kodex gebunden sind, lehnen sie dessen Isolationismus ab. Technologie sollte erhalten bleiben, aber auch eingesetzt werden, um Bedürftigen zu helfen. Das Ödland braucht keine weitere Gruppe von Technologiehortern; Es braucht Wächter, die verstehen, dass die Rettung der Menschheit tatsächlich bedeutet, Menschen zu helfen und nicht nur Artefakte zu schützen.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Steel_Compassion.label: Mitgefühl aus Stahl
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Midwest_Steel_Vanguard.descript: The Midwestern Brotherhood emerged from the wreckage of their crashed airships with a revolutionary understanding: survival demands adaptation. Unlike the isolationists at Lost Hills, the Midwest chapter actively recruits tribals, wastelanders, and even former enemies into their ranks. Technology still matters, but so does building an army capable of halting territory and protecting the people within it. The Codex is a guide, not a chain. Expansion is not corruption - it is evolution.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Midwest_Steel_Vanguard.label: Die stählerne Vorhut
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_Defenders.description: Verteidiger sind Outcast-Spezialisten, die überlegenes technisches Wissen mit Kampffähigkeiten kombinieren. Sie sind dafür verantwortlich, die Technologie vor feindlichen Kräften zu schützen und sicherzustellen, dass keine fortschrittliche Ausrüstung in unwürdige Hände gerät. Ihr Engagement für die Mission ist absolut.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_Defenders.label: Verteidiger des Kodex
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_True_Codex.description: The Outcasts are the Brotherhood's purists - those who refused to compromise the Codex when Elder Lyons went soft. Technology is everything. It's not about helping wastelanders or building communities; it's about preserving humanity's technological legacy before fools destroy it all. The alt World fell because people misused technology - the Brotherhood's sacred duty is to prevent that from happening again by controlling every piece of advanced tech in existence. Outsiders are liabilities at best, threats at worst. Only through absolute dedication to the mission can the Brotherhood fulfill its purpose.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_True_Codex.label: Wahrer Kodex
